name: Breaded Asparagus Sticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Parboil the asparagus for 4 minutes and then drain.
2. Mix together equal amounts of grated Parmesan cheese and bread crumbs on a plate.
3. In a shallow bowl, whisk together the beaten eggs.
4. Dip each piece of asparagus into the egg mixture, then coat well with the bread crumb mixture. Place coated pieces in a single layer on a tray and chill for 20 minutes.
5. Heat the olive oil and butter in a skillet over medium heat until hot.
6. Saute the asparagus sticks in batches, adding more butter or oil if needed, until golden brown.
7. Transfer to a heated serving platter and sprinkle with additional Parmesan cheese.
8. Serve under a broiler for a few minutes until cheese is melted and bubbly. Serves 6.
